rationale: The citing paper references Ansari and Mela (2003) only in grouped citations: once as an example of targeted promotion research and once to support a general methodological point that multivariate normal heterogeneity can be a reasonable approximation. The paper does not build its core BPP model, carryover specification, hypotheses, or optimization procedure from E-Customization specifically. Because the citation serves background positioning and generic methodological support rather than a distinct functional dependency, this is a passing mention.
